title: pilosella fulvipes
intro: Pilosella fulvipes, also known as yellow-sedge mouse-ear, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pilosella fulvipes are thought to include the reduction of inflammation, improvement of digestive issues, and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Pilosella fulvipes is often used as an infusion or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
